title: ellisia nyctelea
intro: Ellisia nyctelea, also known as night-flowering Ellisia or night-flowering evening primrose, is a flowering plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, as it contains bioactive compounds with potential health benefits. Its leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its dried leaves and roots can also be used in herbal remedies.
